motivation: M-Be-H ESCAPE family — arxiv-grounded (.discoveries/rtsc-escape-clathrate.tape). AcBeH8 (2411.19028) proved Be-H = chemical precompressor (181K@10GPa); labeh8 (La, OUR measured m=+0.359) = non-radioactive sibling. Cation substitution Sc/Y into labeh8-lineage structure tests: does ESCAPE (m>0) + lighter cage core (higher omega_log) break the labeh8 117K ceiling?
structure_provenance: seed = labeh8_interp_ablation/scf.in (ibrav=4 hexagonal, La2Be2H6, celldm 6.804/1.611, the campaign's ACTUAL labeh8 structure that gave lambda_BZ=3.903 @20GPa). Honest formula = M2Be2H6 (NOT canonical MBeH8 Fm-3m H16); slug reflects this (sc2be2h6/y2be2h6). vc-relax @press=200kbar (20GPa) adapts lattice per cation.

budget.infra: reused ysbh6 vast pod (80-core), nice -n 15 -np 6 each, $0 incremental

sc2be2h6.hypothesis: ESCAPE m>0 AND omega_log >> labeh8 589K (Sc lighter than La) -> Tc breakthrough
